testcase.name: test_put_theme_accepts_all_new_fields

failure.message: AssertionError: pure_veg_label not echoed: None assert None == 'TEST_iter28_pure_veg_label' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfbb2f0709900>('pure_veg_label') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfbb2f0709900> = {'accent_color': '#aa0000', 'hero_bg_color': '#ff0000', 'hero_promise_line1': 'Ab Ghar Se Bahar Bhi Bindas Khao', 'hero_promise_line2': 'Ghar se Achha Khana', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter28.py:107: in test_put_theme_accepts_all_new_fields assert body.get(f) == f"TEST_iter28_{f}", f"{f} not echoed: {body.get(f)}" E AssertionError: pure_veg_label not echoed: None E assert None == 'TEST_iter28_pure_veg_label' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfbb2f0709900>('pure_veg_label') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfbb2f0709900> = {'accent_color': '#aa0000', 'hero_bg_color': '#ff0000', 'hero_promise_line1': 'Ab Ghar Se Bahar Bhi Bindas Khao', 'hero_promise_line2': 'Ghar se Achha Khana', ...}.get

testcase.name: test_get_theme_returns_persisted_new_fields

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'Test Veg iter28' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfbb2f05a9c80>('pure_veg_label') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfbb2f05a9c80> = {'accent_color': '#aa0000', 'hero_bg_color': '#ff0000', 'hero_promise_line1': 'Ab Ghar Se Bahar Bhi Bindas Khao', 'hero_promise_line2': 'Ghar se Achha Khana', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter28.py:117: in test_get_theme_returns_persisted_new_fields assert body.get("pure_veg_label") == "Test Veg iter28" E AssertionError: assert None == 'Test Veg iter28' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfbb2f05a9c80>('pure_veg_label') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfbb2f05a9c80> = {'accent_color': '#aa0000', 'hero_bg_color': '#ff0000', 'hero_promise_line1': 'Ab Ghar Se Bahar Bhi Bindas Khao', 'hero_promise_line2': 'Ghar se Achha Khana', ...}.get
